subject: Add API to control kafka notification
commit_message:
Add API to control kafka notification

Add support to control notifications at anchor level

Issue-ID: CPS-2067
Change-Id: I56c34400dc73c71b936a51260efd240524ababdc
Signed-off-by: rajesh.kumar <rk00747546@techmahindra.com>
